channel.title: July2026 on LRG
channel.description: Recent content in July2026 on LRG

item.title: July 10th, 2026 14:30
item.description:
Woah, it’s been a minute. I’m feeling better since I fell-off-the-horse - it’s a bit sore, but I’m over it. Not financially over it, but definitely mostly over it emotionally.

So, I’m throwing myself into some side projects. Some music, to which I’ll come back to later, and a bit of lite consulting for my sister who is refactoring her online presence for https://strangesugarstudio.comstrangesugarstudio.com - I’m focussing on fun things, rather than side hustle (a term I always hated anyway) just to feel happy doing computer touching again.
